sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Counterfeit Ozempic Identified in US Supply Chain With Fake Labels And Needles, FDA Alerts - Novo Nordisk  ( NYSE:NVO )
feed.summary: Lot number PAR0362 with serials starting 51746517 flagged as counterfeit Ozempic. FDA links five non-serious adverse events to the counterfeit lot so far. China's new tariffs just reignited the same market patterns that led to triple- and quadruple-digit wins for Matt Maley.
